design_philosophy.core_concept: Royal Fintech - Trust, Heritage, and Growth
principles: Fusion: Old Money Aesthetics + Modern SaaS Functionality
Content is King: Financial data must be legible and beautiful
Negative Space: Luxurious spacing to prevent data fatigue
Contrast: Deep Emeralds against Bone White for authority

typography.installation: Import from Google Fonts: Outfit (300, 400, 500, 600, 700), Inter (400, 500, 600), JetBrains Mono (400, 500)

usage_rules.h1: text-4xl md:text-5xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-primary font-heading
usage_rules.label: text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-muted-foreground/70 font-body

grid_system.specs: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-6 p-6 md:p-8

sidebar.style: Fixed, Dark Theme (Royal Emerald), Gold active indicators

cards.style: Flat white surface, no default border. Add top border accent.
cards.classes: bg-white shadow-sm rounded-xl border-t-4 border-t-emerald-900/10 hover:border-t-amber-600 transition-colors duration-300

buttons.primary: bg-emerald-900 text-white hover:bg-emerald-800 rounded-lg px-6 py-2.5 font-medium shadow-lg shadow-emerald-900/20 transition-all hover:-translate-y-0.5
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-emerald-900 border border-emerald-900/20 hover:bg-emerald-50 rounded-lg px-6 py-2.5 font-medium

inputs.style: Minimalist, bottom border focus or soft ring

tables.style: Clean, spacious rows, no vertical borders
tables.header: bg-slate-50 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider text-slate-500 font-bold

textures.sidebar_noise: Use a subtle noise texture overlay on the dark sidebar to give it a 'premium paper' feel.
textures.login_bg: Use the 'Gold Cloth' image with a heavy dark green overlay.

glassmorphism.usage: Toasts, Floating Action Buttons, Sticky Headers

motion.page_transition: initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 10 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} transition={{ duration: 0.4 }}

placeholders.logo: Use text 'Royal Readymades' in Playfair Display font if no logo image is available.

universal_guidelines: DO NOT use generic 'SaaS Blue' (#3B82F6). Use Emerald (#064E3B) instead.
DO NOT use 'Inter' for headings. Use 'Outfit'.
DO NOT make the dashboard dense and cluttered. Use whitespace.
Ensure all financial numbers are right-aligned and use tabular figures (font-mono).
Create a 'design_system' folder if needed, but prefer 'components/ui' customization.

instructions_to_main_agent.step_1: Install fonts (Outfit, JetBrains Mono) via Google Fonts import in index.css.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_2: Update tailwind.config.js with the Royal Emerald and Antique Gold colors.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_3: Create the Layout wrapper (Sidebar + Main Content area).
instructions_to_main_agent.step_4: Build the Dashboard using the Bento Grid strategy.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_5: Implement the 'Pool' visualization (Pie chart of 70:30 split).
instructions_to_main_agent.step_6: Ensure the 'Login' page looks premium (Dark Green + Gold + Texture).
